query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A lone figure walks across a vast, open plain beneath a heavy, overcast sky. A gently sloping hill rises on the left side of the frame, silhouetted against a gray, fog-filled atmosphere. The small human form is positioned near the right edge, moving through an expansive landscape. The image is rendered in black and white.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A lone figure walks across a vast, open plain beneath a heavy, overcast sky, rendered in muted, faded monochrome tones with crushed blacks and oppressive low contrast. A gently sloping hill rises on the left, barely separated from the underexposed foreground that dissolves into near-total darkness. The small human form near the right edge is isolated in a fog-filled atmosphere that creates a suffocating sense of atmospheric distress and dread.
